# Vanishing RISC-V Benchmark

<!-- Code generated by make bench-vanishing-doc; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Generated by `make bench-vanishing-doc`.

This measures the RISC-V instruction count for the typed vanishing benchmark guest. The proof/system data is embedded as generated typed Zig fixture data. The report splits transcript coin replay from `vanishing.verify`; both are measured inside the same R5 run.

## Result

| Metric | Value |
| --- | ---: |
| RISC-V cycles | 166,036 |
| Transcript replay cycles | 159,725 |
| Poseidon2 compressions in transcript | 5 |
| Transcript cycles / Poseidon2 compression | 31945.00 |
| Vanishing verify cycles | 5,773 |
| Benchmark overhead / markers | 538 |
| Case index | 6 |
| Case name | `Vanishing/ConstantColumn` |
| Modules | 1 |
| Dynamic modules | 0 |
| Rounds | 3 |
| Expressions | 3 |
| Buckets | 1 |
| Vanishings | 1 |
| Witness claims | 1 |
| Quotient claims | 1 |
| Zig release mode | `small` |
| R5 ELF size | 13,184 bytes |
| zkc JSON size | 17,114 bytes |

## Reproduce

```bash
cd verifier-ray
make bench-vanishing-doc VANISHING_BENCH_CASE=6 VANISHING_BENCH_RELEASE=small
```
